title: cyclobalanopsis jingningensis
intro: Cyclobalanopsis jingningensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Fagaceae, commonly known as the Jingning hickory oak. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis jingningensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, and is also used in the production of traditional Chinese medicines such as patent remedies and tonics.
